scripts.install:backend: cd backend && uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run fastapi dev main.py
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -c "blue,green" -n "backend,frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
